utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Each item is fully specified: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) is clear; travel_dates (June 13–18, 2024) are specific; transportation includes flight details with costs (€100 per person, total €400) and relevant details; accommodation includes hotel name, details, amenities, and costs (€200 per night, total €1000); activities list specific items and total cost (€460); additional_services include details about guide services and equipment; total_budget includes total cost, budget limit, and remaining budget. Everything is covered with full details.
